title: NordVPN Review 2026: Still the Best All-Around VPN?
description: NordVPN is the most widely recommended VPN in the world. Here is an honest look at what it does well, where it falls short, and whether it is worth it in 2026.
content:
NordVPN has been the default recommendation for mainstream VPN users for several years. In 2026, is that reputation still earned? Here is a straightforward look at the service.

## Speed and Performance

NordVPN uses its own NordLynx protocol, which is built on WireGuard. On most connections, speed is excellent. In testing across European and US servers, speeds rarely drop below 80 percent of the base connection speed. The NordLynx protocol is particularly strong on mobile and for gaming. OpenVPN is available for users who prefer it, though it is slower.

## Server Network

NordVPN operates more than 6,000 servers in 111 countries. Coverage is strong in Europe, North America, and Asia Pacific. For users in less common locations, server options are more limited. The Obfuscated Servers feature helps users in countries with heavy VPN restrictions connect more reliably.

## Privacy and No-Logs Policy

NordVPN is registered in Panama, which has no mandatory data retention laws. The company has undergone multiple independent audits of its no-logs policy, conducted by Deloitte and PricewaterhouseCoopers. The audits confirm that NordVPN does not log browsing activity, IP addresses, or session information. For most users, this is sufficient assurance.

One note: NordVPN suffered a server breach in 2018 that was not disclosed until 2019. The company has since moved to a RAM-only server architecture, which means no data can be retained on the server hardware even if it is physically accessed. The transparency around this incident, after the initial delay, is considered adequate by most security researchers.

## Streaming and Bypassing Restrictions

NordVPN unblocks Netflix, Disney Plus, BBC iPlayer, and most other major streaming services reliably. Dedicated streaming servers (called "SmartPlay") are available in the app. Streaming performance is one of NordVPN's strongest selling points compared to privacy-focused VPNs like Mullvad, which do not optimize for streaming use.

## Pricing

NordVPN's 2-year plan is typically priced around 3 to 4 dollars per month, making it competitive with similar services. The monthly plan is significantly more expensive at around 12 dollars. A 30-day money-back guarantee is available on all plans.

## Verdict

NordVPN remains a strong all-around choice in 2026. It is fast, has a large server network, reliable streaming support, and a credible no-logs policy. It is not the best choice for users who prioritize privacy above all else (Mullvad and ProtonVPN are stronger there), but for the majority of users who want a reliable VPN for streaming, everyday privacy, and public Wi-Fi protection, NordVPN earns its reputation.
